purpose: Every HTML artifact, tool, or schema must declare which of 9 usefulness dimensions it covers before promotion.

dimensions.label: Instructional Use
dimensions.description: Directly teaches a concept or skill

dimensions.label: Teacher Telemetry
dimensions.description: Surfaces signals a teacher can act on

dimensions.label: Misconception Diagnosis
dimensions.description: Distinguishes behavioral misuse from specific conceptual errors

dimensions.label: Adaptive Support
dimensions.description: Adjusts difficulty or scaffolding based on performance

dimensions.label: Export and Reuse
dimensions.description: Data can be exported to other tools

dimensions.label: Future Improvement Signals
dimensions.description: Generates signals that can improve the artifact itself

promotion_rule: Artifact CANNOT be promoted unless it has a valid declaration with at least 3 covered dimensions.
metablooms_constraint: For 3rd grade bilingual classroom: realtime_feedback + teacher_telemetry required for assessment artifacts. misconception_diagnosis required for math practice artifacts.
